hooks.description: Inject deliver operating rules and available capabilities at session start

steps.message: The deliver plugin is active. Operating rules are in AGENTS.md and OPERATING-RULES.md. The deliver skill orchestrates: FRAME → EXPLORE → LOOP(PLAN → CRITIC → IMPLEMENT → VERIFY → DECIDE). Max 3 iterations. Available agents: explorer, planner (planner.agent.md), critic (critic.agent.md), implementer (implementer.agent.md), verifier (tester.agent.md). Available skills: deliver, explore-task, plan-task, critique-plan, implement-task, test-task, build-execution-graph. Key rules: (1) Contract-first — goals, constraints, testable success criteria. (2) Critic before code — plan is challenged before implementation. (3) External verification is ground truth. (4) Escalate on stall, don't auto-accept. Engineering principles from dev:principles apply.

hooks.description: Remind about change tracking after file modifications

steps.message: File modified. If executing in the deliver loop: track this change in the implementation record (files_changed). If deviating from the plan, document the deviation. Run project formatters/linters if configured.
Protected path detected. This file is guarded by deliver rules (lock files, secrets, generated files, vendored code). Modification requires explicit plan acknowledgment.
